title: Green Enderpearl+
description: This makes it way more visible to see when your pvping.
body: The Green Enderpearl+ texture pack for Minecraft introduces a visually striking overhaul to the traditional ender pearls in the game, replacing their usual blue hue with a vibrant shade of green. This pack also enhances the overall appearance of the ender pearl item, adding intricate details and textures that make it stand out from the standard version. Players who enjoy customizing their Minecraft experience with unique visual modifications will appreciate the attention to detail and creativity found in the Green Enderpearl+ texture pack, adding a fresh new look to this essential item.
